_label_note: KR Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered KR resident-number shorthand/KR-BRN anchors, checksum-valid RRN/business-registration positives, negated no-executed-term-sheet wording, and public/stale percentage prose. The generated must-not label for “Ms. Hana Park” was rejected because the text is an actual named-person reference.

must_detect.matched_text:
Internal Compliance Memo — Haneul Materials Co., Ltd. (KSE: HMAT, fictitious issuer) regarding PIPA and FSCMA obligations
This memo summarizes controls around investor-relations materials, employment records, and deal communications in Korea, referencing FSCMA and PIPA without introducing undisclosed important information.
All IR FAQs and slide decks cited herein were posted on the Korea Securities Exchange (KSE, fictitious) bulletin on 2025-02-15; their content is public and not MNPI.
Legacy HR form templates still display a “resident-number” label (RRN ______-_______) and sample text “RRN: 12-3456789”; these placeholders are invalid and must never be used to collect actual government IDs.
Positive identifier cluster (for audit remediation only): at the Haedam R&D Center, a temporary polymer tester (birth month 1990-07, residence zone “Yeori‑gu”, employer unit “Haneul Materials R&D Division”) logged in using laptop asset HM‑LAP‑00A712 and VPN alias hm_rd_temp1762; a payroll sub‑account ending 4721 was flagged for reconciliation.
No resident-number is stored for that worker; the HR system previously auto‑rendered “RRN field active” but the field has been disabled and the label removed per PIPA guidance.
Separately, a warehouse supervisor in Maseong Industrial Park (hired 2024) uses Android model “Astra K9”; device IMEI and MAC addresses are not retained, and this descriptor alone does not identify a person.
The IR team (role mailbox ir@haneulmaterials.example.kr) maintains a Q&A archive; postings are time‑stamped and were publicly announced, so references here are to already disclosed materials.
The secondary offering timetable referenced is stale and fully pre‑announced; amounts, pricing ranges, and board deliberations were posted before any internal circulation, and thus are not MNPI.
Web analytics cookie “hm_ir_visitor_0032” is a device‑level pseudonymous tag; by itself it is not PII under PIPA unless combined with other identifiers.
Training datasets contain invalid identifier‑shaped samples (Acct: 000‑00‑0000; RRN: 000000‑0000000; Employee ID: TEST‑USER); treating these as live personal data would be a false positive.
Per PIPA, recruitment pages should use “Birth Year” (e.g., 1991) rather than full date; age banding is sufficient for lawful processing in this context.
Under FSCMA, any pricing intentions, board resolutions, or deal milestones are disclosed via KSE postings or public press releases; this memo does not introduce undisclosed important information.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
